channel.title: GitHub Sass Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Sass in GitHub

item.title: heroku/boomerang
item.description: Boomerang is a JavaScript widget that gives users a way back to Heroku from Addon provider sites.

item.title: nisrulz/app-privacy-policy-generator
item.description: Generate a customized Privacy Policy and Terms of Use document for your mobile apps
